chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3580 - وَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِنَّ اَللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى يُحِبُّ اَلْمُحْتَرِفَ اَلْأَمِينَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3580 - Commander of the Faithful, peace be upon him, said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), Blessed and Exalted, loves the trustworthy worker."
